Social | 7pm

single.title: Workshop in Prescott with Branden & Shayla
single.description:
🔥 WEST COAST SWING WORKSHOP 🔥

Join us for an incredible afternoon of dancing with Branden Strong & Shayla Bouise — two phenomenal All Star Dancers and West Coast Swing instructors bringing their style, technique, and creativity to Prescott!

Whether you’re looking to sharpen your skills, learn something new, or just spend time on the dance floor with our amazing dance community, this is an event you won’t want to miss.

**You must have a basic understanding of WCS for this workshop including basic footwork, right and left side passes, sugar push and whip.

✨ Workshop + Open Dancing

📅 This Saturday April 25
🕺 Workshop 2:00-3:00
💃 Open Dancing (Guided Practice!) 3:00-4:00

💵 $30 in advance • $35 at the door

📍 The Bee’s Knees Dance Prescott Studio
215 N. McCormick St, Prescott

⭐ Private Instruction Available ONLY A FEW SLOTS LEFT! Call or text 928-499-4077 to reserve your time with Brandon & Shayla while they’re in town.

Bring a partner or come solo — all are welcome!
Let’s fill the floor and make it an unforgettable day of West Coast Swing.
single.address: The Bee's Knees Dance Prescott, 215 N McCormick St, Prescott, AZ 86301, USA

single.title: White Rabbit: Unplugged - Aloha Open Edition, ep. 3
single.description:
Follow the white rabbit.

Spring is here! And so, once again, are Nivens' dreams of Hawaii. Nivens' birthday being this month, we could hardly deny his request to celebrate with our third annual "All Aloha J&J" and Hawaiian themed Unplugged!

We are delighted to be able to team up again with our friends at 916 Swing and the Aloha Open (https://www.alohaopenwcs.com/) and have the most awesome tournament style J&J that has been an absolute blast each time! And of course, an opportunity for our Novice, Intermediate and Advanced dancers to win passes to the Aloha Open!

Prizes for the All-Aloha contest ($5 entry fee):
1st - Aloha Open passes
2nd - White Rabbit West Coast passes
3rd - White Rabbit: Unplugged passes

The entire night is Hawaiian themed, which means dress in your best island/luautfit, and feel free to bring a Hawaiian snack to share (low-key Luau)!

8pm: All-Aloha Contest
9pm: White Rabbit Aloha Party
$5 (Contest)

Cash/Zelle preferred
Zelle: Sarah Hightower

Remember:
- If it glows it won't say "no"
- White Rabbit is a safe space for all
- No unsolicited feedback on the social floor

Also, per the CDC liquor license, no outside alcohol is permitted.

A night of our special Aloha White Rabbit vibe! All are welcome, see you there!
single.venue: Creative Dance Collective, 2107 W Guadalupe Rd, Mesa, AZ 85202, USA
single.address: Creative Dance Collective, 2107 W Guadalupe Rd, Mesa, AZ 85202, USA
